scope: Pixel-stage toggle and deterministic nearest-neighbor resize with bounded dimensions.

limits.aggregateBudgetBoundary: Worker guard present; explicit stress/perf evidence remains G5-04

rejected: Smooth interpolation: every 2x2 source quadrant remains a crisp 2x2 block.
Disabled toggle drift: disabled pixel stage returns original dimensions, bytes and no resize operation.
Dimension overflow: geometry/protocol limits reject hostile maxSide before resize allocation.
Alpha loss: RGBA bytes, including alpha, are copied by nearest mapping.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: Palette quantization is intentionally not part of G5-01 and remains G5-02; process/results/export UI remains G6/G7.
